summary_en: 3,469,400 shares acquired via ToSTNeT-3 for ¥4.96B on 29-May-2026. Represents 98.8% of ¥5.01B authorization (3.5M shares, 6.71% S/O) approved 28-May-2026. Program completed. Stated purpose: capital efficiency and stock compensation plan funding.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Exchange Trading
translation_en_brief: NS Group Inc. completed a treasury stock acquisition on 29 May 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading. The company purchased 3,469,400 shares for ¥4.96 billion, representing 6.65% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury). This execution consumed 98.8% of the ¥5.01 billion authorization (3.5 million shares, 6.71% of issued stock) approved on 28 May 2026. The stated purpose is to improve capital efficiency and to fund shares issued under the company's stock option and restricted stock compensation program.
